caption: 这个间距不对。
scene: Sage sitting at a small desk at night facing a single monitor showing two tiny rectangles with a small gap between them and a faint ruler line, one paw nudging a mechanical keyboard, a tiny crescent moon in a small window behind, mouth a flat focused line
bible_hook: §2 Sage pixel-pushes at 11pm before a review because the spacing was 2px off and it bothered him
rationale: Pulls into Sage's design-work grind (bucket A) after a run of domestic and Andy-work posts; the 2px obsession is a fresh prop never drawn, distinct from coffee/gym/balcony motifs.
